The native will live upto an age of at least 62 years and earn plenty of

CHART 109
In this case the Sun is conjunct Jupiter and has Moon' in the 7th
therefrom. The native will be a trader in rice and other edible commodities.
The position ofVenus in 2nd to the Sun and Ketu in the third and Saturn in
the 4th to him, indicates that. he will deal in oils, conveyances and the trade is
likely to flourish well. The native will have only medium education. He will
be dogged in nature, but he will be a hard ~d earnest worker wherever he
